# Additional dependencies required by benchmark environment verifiers.
# Install with: pip install -r requirements_benchmark.txt
#
# These are NOT needed for the core gym-anything library — only for running
# the full benchmark corpus (verifier scripts import these packages).
#
# Auto-generated by scripts/extract_benchmark_deps.py

Pillow
opencv-python
scikit-image

# ML / Data
numpy
pandas
scipy
scikit-learn

odfpy
python-pptx

beautifulsoup4
requests

phpserialize
